title: Enzyme Kinetics and Engineering
author: Mafi, Jayden
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Enzyme kinetics is a branch of biochemistry that studies chemical reactions catalyzed by enzymes and how various factors influence the rate of enzyme-catalyzed reactions. This review will cover the fundamental principles of enzyme kinetics, including Michaelis-Menten kinetics, enzyme-substrate complex formation, and enzyme inhibitors. Additionally, this review will also cover recent advancements in the field of enzyme kinetics and its applications.
steps_raw: Enzyme kinetics is a branch of biochemistry that studies chemical reactions catalyzed by enzymes and how various factors influence the rate of enzyme-catalyzed reactions.
